headline: Analysts turn heads with AMD stock forecast after massive rally

headline: CTONE Group Unveils AI Strategy and New Agent Computer Series
summary: On May 8, 2026, CTONE held its AI Computing Strategy Transformation and New Product Launch Event in Shenzhen, officially announcing its transition from a "global leader in Mini PCs" to a "builder of the AI computing ecosystem," and unveiling the CTONE Agent Computer and AI Agent Workstation series.
